title: Asymptotic Freedom as Depth Traversal

analysis.object: T802: Asymptotic Freedom as Depth Traversal depth analysis

high_energy_coupling.description: High energy (Lambda >> Lambda_QCD): coupling g -> 0 -- perturbative

low_energy_coupling.description: Low energy (Lambda << Lambda_QCD): coupling g -> inf -- non-perturbative

rg_flow.description: RG flow: beta(g) = -b_0 g^3 + ... -- flow from EML-inf to EML-2 as energy increases
rg_flow.reason: RG flow is EML-3 -- oscillatory differential equation

mass_gap_location.description: Mass gap location: Lambda_QCD = scale where coupling = O(1) -- depth transition
mass_gap_location.reason: The EML-3 to EML-2 transition point

depth_traversal.description: RG flow IS a depth traversal: EML-inf (IR) -> EML-3 (transition) -> EML-2 (UV)
depth_traversal.reason: The traversal is the RG flow itself

transition_scale.description: Lambda_QCD = the EML-3 stratum in energy space -- where coupling becomes oscillatory

t802_theorem.description: T802: Asymptotic freedom = depth traversal from EML-inf (IR) to EML-2 (UV). The mass gap lives at the EML-3 transition scale Lambda_QCD. T802.
t802_theorem.reason: Asymptotic freedom is EML depth traversal

analysis.theorem: T802: Asymptotic Freedom as Depth Traversal (S1081).

key_theorem: T802: Asymptotic Freedom as Depth Traversal (S1081).
